name: policy_number_present
expression: policy_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(policy_number)) > 0
description: policy_number is required for Policy Declaration Page extraction.

name: named_insured_present
expression: named_insured IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(named_insured)) > 0
description: named_insured is required for Policy Declaration Page extraction.

name: carrier_name_present
expression: carrier_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(carrier_name)) > 0
description: carrier_name is required for Policy Declaration Page extraction.

name: premium_total_non_negative
description: premium_total should be non-negative when present.
